target.name: improve
target.description: Improve all issue types across the codebase

clicks.analysis:
You are an expert software architect. Make ONE high-leverage structural improvement that eliminates as many issues as possible at once.

TOP ISSUES BY VOLUME (score: 83/100, 663 total issues):
  - [medium] repeated code lines: 307 occurrences
  - [low] lines >120 chars: 222 occurrences — in /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/scripts/generate-dd-report-v2.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/scripts/generate-dd-report.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/scripts/generate-real-report.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/scripts/generate-sample-pdf.ts
  - [low] console.log calls in src: 93 occurrences — in /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/log.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/report.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/scan.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/simulate.ts
  - [medium] functions >50 lines: 26 occurrences — in /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/debate.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/improve.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/init.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/log.ts
  - [low] dead code indicators (TODO, commented code): 7 occurrences
  - [medium] any types: 4 occurrences — in /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/scripts/generate-real-report.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/commands/scan.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/core/pdf-report.ts, /Users/giovanni/Projects/ratchet/src/core/scan-cache.ts
  - [medium] await-in-loop patterns: 3 occurrences
  - [medium] missing auth/security controls: 1 occurrences

ARCHITECTURAL OPPORTUNITIES TO CONSIDER:
  - If multiple files share duplicated logic → extract a shared module/utility
  - If a file is a god class/module → split it into focused modules
  - If many files import the same pattern differently → consolidate with a shared abstraction
  - If error handling is scattered → centralize error types/handlers
  - If types are duplicated across files → extract to a shared types module

RELAXED CONSTRAINTS (architect mode):
  - You may change up to 20 files and 500 lines total
  - You MAY create new files (shared modules, utilities, type definitions)
  - You MUST update all import paths when extracting or moving code
  - All existing tests MUST still pass — if tests break, the change will be rolled back
  - Make ONE cohesive structural change, not many unrelated fixes

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Analyze the top issues and identify the highest-leverage architectural improvement
2. Make the structural change (extract module, consolidate, refactor)
3. Update all import paths throughout the codebase
4. Verify the change is cohesive and tests would pass

After making changes, output each modified or created file:
MODIFIED: <filepath>
